page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Quantifying abundances of transcripts from RNA-Seq data, or more generally of target sequences using high-throughput sequencing reads.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Quantifying abundances of transcripts from rna-seq data, or more generally of target sequences using high-throughput sequencing reads
page_metadata.biotools__summary: A program for quantifying abundances of transcripts from RNA-Seq data, or more generally of target sequences using high-throughput sequencing reads. It is based on the novel idea of pseudoalignment for rapidly determining the compatibility of reads with targets, without the need for alignment.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A program for quantifying abundances of transcripts from RNA-Seq data, or more generally of target sequences using high-throughput sequencing reads. It is based on the novel idea of pseudoalignment for rapidly determining the compatibility of reads with targets, without the need for alignment.
page_metadata.galaxy__summary: kallisto is a program for quantifying abundances of transcripts from RNA-Seqdata, or more generally of target sequences using high-throughput sequencingreads. It is based on the novel idea of pseudoalignment for rapidlydetermining the compatibility of reads with targets, without the need foralignment.
